posts.author: Suny_Banerjee
posts.text: Show expiry date for position symbols — You can group your F&O positions by Underlying & Expiry on the Kite app — just like on the web. This makes it easier to identify and track contracts by their expiry dates. Tap the filter icon on the Positions screen to access this option. If you don’t see this option, please make sure your app is updated to the latest version from the App Store or Play Store. Please find the attachments given below. image 363×789 42.6 KB image 359×729 54.9 KB

posts.text: Show expiry date for position symbols — @Suny_Banerjee

posts.author: Nitin_Sharma3
posts.text: Show expiry date for position symbols — Hi Team, One usability issue I face in the Kite app Positions tab is that expiry dates are not visible for F&O positions. For example, if I have 15-20 option/futures positions open, there is no quick way to identify which contract belongs to which expiry. Currently, I have to manually add symbols to the watchlist just to check their expiry dates, which becomes very painful and time-consuming. It would be very helpful if the expiry date could be shown for symbols added in the Positions screen This small addition would greatly improve usability for active…
